title: Hawk Carrow
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Hawk}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Hawk Carrow |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{WEGCite|story=Regina Cayli (adventure)|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)}} |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Say, Roark, my man. You ever flown an Imperial transport?''"
"''Bad idea.''"
"''Yeah. Let's do it…|Hawk Carrow and Roark Garnet|}} '''Hawk Carrow''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Carrow often accompanied [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] as a [[Pilot/Legends|co-pilot]] aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Dorion Discus]]''. During one mission, the ''Dorion Discus'' crashed on [[New Bakstre]] and Carrow was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. Garnet rescued Carrow from the [[M-Class Imperial Attack Transport]] ''[[Regina Cayli]]''. ==Biography== [[File:RoarkGarnet.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Roark Garnet rescued Hawk from the ''Regina Cayli'']] Hawk Carrow operated as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], occasionally working as a co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] aboard his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Dorion Discus]]''. While making an unscheduled delivery to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Bakstre]], the ''Dorion Discus'' was forced down by [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]]. Carrow's leg was wounded by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[M-Class Imperial Attack Transport]] ''[[Regina Cayli]]'', and he was captured. In the ship's [[Medical bay/Legends|infirmary]], a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] applied a [[healing sheath]] to Carrow's leg. Garnet, who had evaded capture by the Empire, infiltrated the ''Regina Cayli'' and rescued Carrow. Sometime later, Carrow and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[Nagraoao]] were captured by the Empire and [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]]. Roark Garnet took the ''Dorion Discus'' to the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]] to rescue his friends, but was stopped for inspection by a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Garnet bribed the [[Unidentified Imperial officer (Kessel system)|Navy officer]] to let him go.[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|3|The Void Terror|reprint=1}} *{{WEGCite|story=Regina Cayli (adventure)|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] *''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]'' *''[[Classic Campaigns]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Carrow, Hawk}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
